data.title: BW LPG Limited – Update on BW LPG’s Product Services Q1 2026 Segment Performance
data.description: Singapore-based company BW LPG Limited, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange as "BWLPG.OL" and on the New York Stock Exchange as "BWLP," released an update on its BW Product Services division's performance in the first quarter of 2026. During the quarter ending on March 31, 2026, BW Product Services recorded a gross profit of around USD 127 million. This profit includes a favorable unrealized mark-to-market adjustment of USD 137 million from their active cargo contracts and hedging activities.

data.title: Ferring Pharmaceuticals and Gallup Announce Landmark Global Public Attitudes Study on Fertility and Family-Building
data.description: Ferring Pharmaceuticals and Gallup unveiled the Ferring Global Fertility Monitor at the 2026 Annual Convening of Semafor World Economy in Washington. This study focuses on factors impacting individuals' fertility decisions worldwide. The initiative addresses the pressing issue of plummeting global fertility rates, which have dropped below replacement levels in numerous nations. This collaboration highlights the importance of understanding and tackling the challenges associated with declining fertility rates.

data.title: Net asset value of the EfTEN United Property Fund as of 31.03.2026
data.description: In March 2026, EfTEN United Property Fund saw a net profit of 106,000 euros, with a total of 461,000 euros earned in the first quarter of the year. This marked a decrease from the previous year's 706,000 euros in the same period. The net asset value (NAV) of the fund unit stood at 11.95 euros by the end of March, showing a monthly increase of 0.4%.

data.title: BioVersys has started the pivotal Phase 3 RIV-TARGET trial for BV100, with the first patient's visit complete.
data.description: In a recent update, it has been reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has now exceeded 200,000. The health ministry has announced that 5,000 new cases were recorded in the past 24 hours alone. Furthermore, the death toll has risen to 4,000, with 100 new fatalities reported. The government is continuing its efforts to combat the spread of the virus and has urged the public to adhere to safety regulations to prevent further escalation of the situation.相The situation is evolving rapidly, and authorities are closely monitoring the developments to take necessary actions.

data.title: Pluxee delivers strong margin expansion and cash generation in H1 Fiscal 2026, reaffirming all full‑year objectives
data.description: Pluxee has reported impressive margin expansion and cash generation in the first half of fiscal year 2026, showcasing their financial strength and stability. The company remains confident in achieving all of its full-year goals. This performance reflects a substantial increase in profitability and cash flow for Pluxee, indicating successful business strategies and operations. Investors and stakeholders can be assured of the company's robust financial health and prospects for the remainder of the fiscal year.

data.title: STRADVISION Enables Scalable ADAS Deployment in India's Commercial Vehicle Market with Efficient AI Perception
data.description: In Seoul, South Korea, on April 16, 2026, STRADVISION revealed that a leading company in AI-driven vision perception technology for automotive uses has been chosen by a prominent commercial vehicle OEM to implement SVNet in all its vehicles in India. This significant step emphasizes the growing interest in advanced technology, marking an important milestone for STRADVISION in the automotive industry.
